properties.remark: A WEAK LANDSPOUT OCCURRED WITH SOME CONVECTIVE SHOWERS IN THE REGION, IN THE AREA OF A FRONTAL BOUNDARY. IT WAS IN AN OPEN FIELD, PULLED UP SOME DIRT, BUT DISSIPATED VERY QUICKLY AND DID NOT TRAVEL MORE THAN A HUNDRED FEET. IT TRAVELED FROM EAST-SOUTHEAST TO WEST-NORTHWEST. RADAR ACTIVITY SHOWED NO THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AREA, JUST A WEAK RAIN SHOWER. A VIDEO OF THE LANDSPOUT IS AVAILABLE ON OUR FACEBOOK PAGE. HTTPS://WWW.FACEBOOK.COM/NWSGLASGOW/ TORNADO DURATION 3 MINUTES.

THE RURAL UTILITY HAD 50 SINGLE POLE LINES SNAPPED OR BLOWN OVER ALONG HIGHWAY 13. THEY HAD ANOTHER 15 POLES SNAPPED AND BLOWN OVER 1.5 MILES WEST OF THE DAMAGE ALONG THE HIGHWAY AS WELL.
